blocks.body: Multiplying a polynomial by a monomial: distribute (multiply the monomial by each term). Example: 3x(2x^2 - 5x + 4) = 6x^3 - 15x^2 + 12x.
FOIL: First, Outer, Inner, Last. (a+b)(c+d) = ac + ad + bc + bd. Example: (x+3)(x-2) = x^2 - 2x + 3x - 6 = x^2 + x - 6.

blocks.text: Dividing a Polynomial by a Monomial

blocks.body: Divide each term of the polynomial by the monomial separately. Example: (6x^3 - 9x^2 + 3x) / 3x = 2x^2 - 3x + 1.
